ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species_lists" (
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species list */,
  "list_name" TEXT /* Name of the species list */,
  "list_type" TEXT /* Type of species list (e.g., other, endangered, protected) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the list */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the list was submitted */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the list was last updated */,
  "item_count" INTEGER /* Number of species items in the list */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region the species list covers */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the list is public or private */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the list */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the list (e.g., active, draft, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_lists_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "list_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each list type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the list type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the list type */,
  "is_protected" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the list type is protected */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the list type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the owner belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the owner account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the owner account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species_type" TEXT /* Type of species (e.g., flora, fauna) */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "iucn_status" TEXT /* IUCN Red List status of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat type of the species */,
  "threats" TEXT /* Threats to the species */,
  "population_trend" TEXT /* Population trend of the species */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the species record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the species record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "list_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each list item */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species list */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species in the list */,
  "abundance" TEXT /* Abundance level of the species in the list */,
  "last_observed" TEXT /* Date the species was last observed */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Any additional comments about the species in the list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_list_items_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_list_items_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES species_lists ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species list */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the revision */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the revision (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES species_lists ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species list */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES species_lists ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., conservationist, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_permissions FOREIGN KEY ("permissions") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view list, edit list) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the image (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_images_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)
